title: Mountain View Apuseni Dark Gallery Hero

reviews.title: Recenzii de 5 stele pe Google
reviews.text: Oaspetii aleg Mountain View Apuseni pentru liniste, intimitate si detaliile care fac sejurul sa se simta premium.

hero.title: Mountain View Apuseni
hero.subhead: O cabana premium pentru cupluri si grupuri mici, cu jacuzzi exterior, cada in dormitor si linistea Muntilor Apuseni.

images.alt: Mountain View Apuseni cabana luminata seara printre brazi

Mountain View Apuseni A-frame cabana vazuta frontal la apus

Mountain View Apuseni cabana in peisaj montan
Jacuzzi exterior la apus la Mountain View Apuseni
Cada in dormitor la Mountain View Apuseni
Mountain View Apuseni cabana vazuta din lateral in peisaj montan
Exterior Mountain View Apuseni cu terasa si vedere spre padure

experiences.title: Ritualuri de munte, fara graba
experiences.text: Patru momente care definesc sejurul la Mountain View Apuseni: spa privat, seri afara, foc de poveste si o bucatarie pregatita pentru cine lente.

items.title: Cada de lux in dormitor
items.text: Rasfata-te intr-un refugiu romantic cu o cada eleganta pozitionata chiar in dormitor. Ferestrele mari incadreaza padurea, iar lumina calda transforma seara intr-un ritual intim.

image.alt: Cada freestanding in dormitor la Mountain View Apuseni

items.title: Jacuzzi sub stele
items.text: Jacuzzi-ul exterior sta sub pergola cu verdeata si lumini ambientale. Apusul, aerul rece si apa calda creeaza genul de liniste pentru care merita sa urci pana aici.

image.alt: Jacuzzi exterior la apus la Mountain View Apuseni

items.title: Povesti la foc
items.text: Aduna-te in jurul focului sub cer instelat, cu leaganul aproape si padurea in jur. E locul pentru vin, board games, rasete si conversatii care se lungesc firesc.

image.alt: Zona de foc exterior la apus la Mountain View Apuseni

items.title: Complet echipata pentru delicii culinare
items.text: Bucataria din lemn este pregatita pentru mic dejunuri lente si cine de cabana: espresso, plita cu inductie, masina de spalat vase si tot ce ai nevoie fara sa parasesti refugiul.

image.alt: Bucatarie complet echipata la Mountain View Apuseni

location.title: In inima Muntilor Apuseni
location.text: Cabana este asezata in Dealu Negru, cu padure si drumuri montane in jur. Deschide harta preferata si porneste navigatia direct catre proprietate.
location.address: P24P+24, Dealu Negru, Muntii Apuseni, Romania

prices.title: Tarife clare pentru refugiul tau
prices.text: Tarifele pornesc de la pretul de baza pentru cabana si se ajusteaza pentru grupuri de pana la 4 oaspeti. Pentru sejururi mai lungi, primesti automat un discount.

notes.title: Reducere multi-noapte
notes.text: Se oferă o reducere de 10% pentru șederi mai lungi de 2 nopți.

notes.title: Prețuri de sărbători
notes.text: Tarifele pot varia în perioada Crăciunului și a Revelionului.

prices.footnote: Toate preturile sunt in RON. Pentru disponibilitate si rezervari, contacteaza-ne direct.

en.title: Mountain View Apuseni Dark Gallery Hero
en.metaDescription: A premium cabin for couples and small groups, with an outdoor jacuzzi, a bathtub in the bedroom, and the quiet of the Apuseni Mountains.

reviews.title: 5-star reviews on Google
reviews.text: Guests choose Mountain View Apuseni for peace, privacy, and details that make the stay feel premium.

hero.title: Mountain View Apuseni
hero.subhead: A premium cabin for couples and small groups, with an outdoor jacuzzi, a bathtub in the bedroom, and the quiet of the Apuseni Mountains.

images.alt: Mountain View Apuseni cabin glowing at dusk among fir trees
Outdoor fire pit and seating area at sunset at Mountain View Apuseni
Mountain View Apuseni A-frame cabin seen from the front at sunset
Kitchen and dining area at Mountain View Apuseni
Mountain View Apuseni cabin in a mountain landscape
Outdoor jacuzzi at sunset at Mountain View Apuseni
Bathtub in the bedroom at Mountain View Apuseni
Mountain View Apuseni cabin seen from the side in a mountain landscape
Mountain View Apuseni exterior with terrace and forest view

experiences.title: Slow mountain rituals
experiences.text: Four moments that define a stay at Mountain View Apuseni: private spa time, evenings outside, fireside stories, and a kitchen ready for slow dinners.

items.title: Luxury bathtub in the bedroom
items.text: Treat yourself to a romantic retreat with an elegant bathtub placed right inside the bedroom. Large windows frame the forest, while warm light turns the evening into an intimate ritual.

image.alt: Freestanding bathtub in the bedroom at Mountain View Apuseni

items.title: Jacuzzi under the stars
items.text: The outdoor jacuzzi sits beneath a pergola with greenery and ambient lights. Sunset, crisp air, and warm water create the kind of quiet worth climbing the mountain for.

image.alt: Outdoor jacuzzi at sunset at Mountain View Apuseni

items.title: Stories by the fire
items.text: Gather around the fire under a starry sky, with the swing nearby and forest all around. It is the place for wine, board games, laughter, and conversations that naturally run late.

image.alt: Outdoor fire pit area at sunset at Mountain View Apuseni

items.title: Fully equipped for culinary treats
items.text: The wood kitchen is ready for slow breakfasts and cabin dinners: espresso, induction cooktop, dishwasher, and everything you need without leaving the retreat.

image.alt: Fully equipped kitchen at Mountain View Apuseni

location.title: In the heart of the Apuseni Mountains
location.address: P24P+24, Dealu Negru, Apuseni Mountains, Romania
location.text: The cabin is set in Dealu Negru, with forest and mountain roads all around. Open your preferred map and start navigation directly to the property.

prices.title: Clear rates for your retreat
prices.text: Rates start with the base cabin price and adjust for groups of up to 4 guests. Longer stays receive an automatic discount.

notes.title: Multi-night discount
notes.text: A 10% discount is available for stays longer than 2 nights.

notes.title: Holiday pricing
notes.text: Rates may vary during Christmas and New Year’s Eve.

prices.footnote: All prices are in RON. For availability and reservations, contact us directly.
